touches.ai_summary: Inbound inquiry from Mateo Ali at RidgeAI. Director of CS expressed interest in improving forecasting accuracy for their PropTech operations. Currently evaluating solutions including Fireflies. Looking for AI-powered conversation intelligence.

questions_asked.question: Does your platform support real-time forecasting analytics from sales calls?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, our platform processes calls in real-time and provides forecasting signals based on conversation patterns and sentiment.

next_steps: Send overview deck and schedule qualification call

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with product overview and ROI calculator. Mateo confirmed interest and availability for next week. Mentioned they're currently piloting Fireflies but looking for more robust forecasting capabilities.

questions_asked.question: What's your typical implementation timeline for a team of ~25-30 users?
questions_asked.answer: Standard implementation is 2-3 weeks including onboarding and training.

touches.ai_summary: Initial discovery call with Mateo. Discussed RidgeAI's current tech stack and pain points with forecasting accuracy. Team of 335 across multiple regions, CS team struggling with pipeline predictability. Mateo is championing the evaluation internally.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the urgency around forecasting accuracy right now?
questions_asked.answer: We missed our Q1 targets by 18% - leadership wants better visibility into deal health before end of Q2.

questions_asked.question: How does your forecasting model compare to Fireflies' approach?
questions_asked.answer: We use proprietary XGBoost models trained on enterprise deal patterns, versus their keyword-based scoring.

next_steps: Share case study on forecasting accuracy
Loop in Owen Weber (COO) for executive perspective

touches.ai_summary: Quick qualification call to confirm budget authority and decision process. Mateo has influence but Owen Weber (COO) will need to approve any purchase over $15K. Budget allocated for Q2. Timeline is 4-6 weeks to close.

questions_asked.question: What's your allocated budget range for this initiative?
questions_asked.answer: We have $25-30K budgeted for conversation intelligence this quarter.

touches.ai_summary: Sent technical requirements questionnaire and integration checklist. Mateo responded with current CRM setup (Salesforce), call recording tools (Zoom, Teams), and data privacy requirements. Expressed interest in unlimited automation tier.
next_steps: Schedule discovery deep-dive for next week

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call focused on use cases and success metrics. Mateo outlined three key needs: real-time deal risk scoring, competitor mention tracking (especially Fireflies comparisons), and automated next-step recommendations. Discussed 26-seat deployment across CS and sales leadership.

questions_asked.question: Can we track specific competitor mentions and get alerts when Fireflies comes up?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have competitive intelligence triggers that can alert you in real-time and aggregate trends.

questions_asked.question: What would success look like for you in 90 days?
questions_asked.answer: 10% improvement in forecast accuracy and cutting our deal review time in half.

next_steps: Build custom demo focused on forecasting use case

touches.ai_summary: Discovery session on integration requirements and data flow. Discussed API architecture, SSO setup, and data residency. Mateo confirmed need for unlimited automation due to high call volume (200+ calls/week). Technical feasibility confirmed.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the unlimited automation tier vs standard?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited includes custom workflow triggers, API access, and advanced AI agent capabilities - no limits on processed calls or automation runs.

next_steps: Schedule technical evaluation with platform team

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation scheduled but had to reschedule due to Mateo's conflict with board meeting. Confirmed new time for later this week.
next_steps: Reschedule technical eval for Thursday afternoon

touches.ai_summary: Comprehensive technical evaluation with Mateo and two platform engineers. Deep dive into HNSW indexing, XGBoost scoring methodology, and real-time pipeline architecture. Team tested sandbox with sample calls. Engineers impressed with retrieval speed and accuracy. Discussed data privacy and SOC2 compliance.

questions_asked.question: How does the HNSW indexing handle our call volume as we scale to 500+ calls per week?
questions_asked.answer: HNSW is designed for horizontal scaling - we have customers processing 5K+ calls weekly with sub-100ms query times.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the XGBoost model with our own deal outcome data?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, the model supports transfer learning with your historical data to improve accuracy for your specific sales motion.

questions_asked.question: What concerns do you have about the technical architecture?
questions_asked.answer: None major - we want to confirm data retention policies and verify the API rate limits for our automation workflows.

objections: Need to validate data retention aligns with our 7-year compliance requirement

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with data retention documentation and SOC2 report. Confirmed 10-year retention available on unlimited tier. Mateo approved and requested demo for Owen Weber (COO) next week.
next_steps: Schedule executive demo with Owen Weber

touches.ai_summary: Executive demo focused on business value and forecasting ROI. Walked through live deal risk scoring, competitive intelligence dashboard, and automated workflows. Mateo engaged, asked about reporting capabilities for leadership. Positive reception overall.

questions_asked.question: Can we build custom dashboards for our executive team showing forecast confidence by region?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, the platform includes a dashboard builder with pre-built templates and full customization options.

questions_asked.question: What would make this a no-brainer decision for Owen and the exec team?
questions_asked.answer: Clear ROI tied to forecast accuracy improvement and proof it's meaningfully better than Fireflies.

next_steps: Set up Owen Weber executive meeting
Prepare business case with Fireflies comparison

touches.ai_summary: Sent formal proposal with two pricing options: 26 seats unlimited automation at $27,800/year (list) or 26 seats standard at $18,200. Mateo acknowledged receipt and confirmed Owen meeting scheduled but had to push to next week due to Owen's travel.
next_steps: Stand by for questions on proposal

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Owen Weber scheduled but rescheduled last-minute due to investor call conflict. Owen's admin confirmed alternative time two days out.

Brief executive meeting with Owen Weber. Reviewed business case and forecasting ROI projections. Owen focused on cost and asked why unlimited tier pricing is 50% higher than standard. Expressed concern about budget fit.

questions_asked.question: What justifies the premium for unlimited automation - is that really necessary for our use case?
questions_asked.answer: Given your 200+ calls weekly and custom workflow requirements, standard tier caps would limit your ROI - unlimited ensures no bottlenecks.

objections: Pricing feels high compared to our current Fireflies pilot which is under $10K

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Mateo. Discussed Owen's pricing concerns and budget constraints. Mateo advocated for unlimited tier but acknowledged $27,800 is above approved budget. Requested creative pricing options to stay closer to $20K range.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on the unlimited tier pricing if we commit to annual prepay?
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with leadership - annual prepay could unlock 15-20% discount depending on timing.

questions_asked.question: What's the absolute ceiling Owen can approve without escalating to the board?
questions_asked.answer: Probably $22-23K all-in - anything above that requires board review which adds 3-4 weeks.

objections: Budget constraint is real - we're also evaluating other tools this quarter and can't exceed allocated amount

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Owen to discuss revised pricing proposal. Presented 26 seats unlimited at $17,700 (36% discount) with annual prepay. Owen receptive but wants Mateo to validate technical decision vs Fireflies before final approval.

questions_asked.question: How confident are you that your forecasting accuracy is materially better than Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: Our customers average 23% better forecast accuracy versus Fireflies based on third-party analysis - happy to share the report.

touches.ai_summary: Pricing validation call with Mateo. Reviewed $17,700 offer and confirmed it fits budget. Discussed contract terms, payment schedule, and implementation timeline. Mateo pushing for late payment terms (Net 60) to align with their fiscal planning.

questions_asked.question: Can we do Net 60 payment terms instead of Net 30?
questions_asked.answer: Standard is Net 30, but I can check if finance will approve Net 45 given the annual prepay.

questions_asked.question: What happens if we need to add more seats mid-year?
questions_asked.answer: You can add seats anytime - we prorate the annual cost and true-up at renewal.

touches.ai_summary: Quick exec check-in with Owen on contract terms. Confirmed Net 45 payment terms approved. Owen requested one change: wants to include a 90-day performance review clause with opt-out if forecasting improvement doesn't meet 10% threshold.

questions_asked.question: Can we add a performance guarantee - if we don't see 10% forecast improvement in 90 days, we get a pro-rated refund?
questions_asked.answer: That's unusual, but let me discuss with our leadership team - we're confident in the results.

objections: We need downside protection given the heavy discount and urgency to show ROI

touches.ai_summary: Email exchange with Mateo on performance clause. Proposed compromise: 90-day success review with option to adjust deployment strategy, but no refund clause (not company policy). Mateo understood and will position to Owen.
next_steps: Mateo to discuss compromise with Owen

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Mateo on final terms. Discussed performance clause compromise - agreed to quarterly business reviews with dedicated CSM and commit to optimization if targets not met, but no refund provision. Mateo comfortable with this approach.

questions_asked.question: Will we have a dedicated CSM for the first 6 months to ensure we hit the forecasting targets?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, all unlimited tier customers get dedicated CSM through onboarding and first two quarters.

questions_asked.question: Is there anything else blocking you from recommending approval to Owen?
questions_asked.answer: No, this addresses our concerns - I'll walk Owen through the QBR commitment and get his sign-off.

next_steps: Send final contract with QBR language
Mateo to get Owen's final approval
Target signature by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Final executive alignment call with Owen. Reviewed complete package: $17,700 annual for 26 seats unlimited automation, Net 45 terms, dedicated CSM, quarterly business reviews with success metrics. Owen approved pending legal review (standard 3-5 days).

questions_asked.question: When can we realistically start onboarding after contract signature?
questions_asked.answer: We can kick off within 48 hours of signature - typical onboarding is 2-3 weeks to full deployment.
